---
title: "RIP-seq: eIF3d RIP vs Riboseq Overlap"
author: "Kate"
date: "2026-05"
output: html_document
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggvenn)
```

```{r constants}
RIP_LFC_CUT  <- 1
RIP_PADJ_CUT <- 0.05
TE_LFC_CUT   <- 0.5
TE_PADJ_CUT  <- 0.05
```

```{r load_data}
rip_nor <- read_csv(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_normoxia_1hr_flag_eif3d_vs_igg.csv"))
rip_hyp <- read_csv(here("ripseq", "output", "ripseq_deseq_hypoxia_1hr_flag_eif3d_vs_igg.csv"))

te_nor <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_normoxia_1and4hr.csv")) |>
  mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id))
te_hyp <- read_csv(here("output", "translation_categories_si3d_vs_sictrl_hypoxia_1hr.csv")) |>
  mutate(gene_id_clean = sub("\\..*", "", gene_id))
```

```{r join_nor}
joined_nor <- inner_join(
  rip_nor |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, symbol, rip_lfc = log2FoldChange, rip_padj = padj),
  te_nor  |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, te_lfc, te_padj),
  by = "gene_id_clean"
) |>
  mutate(
    rip_hit  = !is.na(rip_lfc)  & rip_lfc  > RIP_LFC_CUT & rip_padj < RIP_PADJ_CUT,
    ribo_hit = !is.na(te_lfc) & !is.na(te_padj) & te_lfc > TE_LFC_CUT & te_padj < TE_PADJ_CUT
  )
cat("Normoxia joined genes:", nrow(joined_nor), "\n")
cat("  RIP hits:", sum(joined_nor$rip_hit), "\n")
cat("  Riboseq hits:", sum(joined_nor$ribo_hit), "\n")
```

```{r join_hyp}
joined_hyp <- inner_join(
  rip_hyp |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, symbol, rip_lfc = log2FoldChange, rip_padj = padj),
  te_hyp  |> dplyr::select(gene_id_clean, te_lfc, te_padj),
  by = "gene_id_clean"
) |>
  mutate(
    rip_hit  = !is.na(rip_lfc)  & rip_lfc  > RIP_LFC_CUT & rip_padj < RIP_PADJ_CUT,
    ribo_hit = !is.na(te_lfc) & !is.na(te_padj) & te_lfc > TE_LFC_CUT & te_padj < TE_PADJ_CUT
  )
cat("Hypoxia joined genes:", nrow(joined_hyp), "\n")
cat("  RIP hits:", sum(joined_hyp$rip_hit), "\n")
cat("  Riboseq hits:", sum(joined_hyp$ribo_hit), "\n")
```

# Venn Diagrams

```{r venn_nor}
venn_list_nor <- list(
  "FLAG3D RIP\n(LFC>1, padj<0.05)"   = joined_nor$gene_id_clean[joined_nor$rip_hit],
  "Riboseq TE\n(LFC>0.5, padj<0.05)" = joined_nor$gene_id_clean[joined_nor$ribo_hit]
)
p_venn_nor <- ggvenn(venn_list_nor, fill_color = c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9"), text_size = 4) +
  ggtitle("Normoxia 1hr")
p_venn_nor
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "08_venn_normoxia.pdf"), p_venn_nor, width = 5, height = 4)
```

```{r venn_hyp}
venn_list_hyp <- list(
  "FLAG3D RIP\n(LFC>1, padj<0.05)"   = joined_hyp$gene_id_clean[joined_hyp$rip_hit],
  "Riboseq TE\n(LFC>0.5, padj<0.05)" = joined_hyp$gene_id_clean[joined_hyp$ribo_hit]
)
p_venn_hyp <- ggvenn(venn_list_hyp, fill_color = c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9"), text_size = 4) +
  ggtitle("Hypoxia 1hr")
p_venn_hyp
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "08_venn_hypoxia.pdf"), p_venn_hyp, width = 5, height = 4)
```

# Odds Ratio and Fisher's Exact Test

```{r fisher_nor}
ct_nor <- table(rip_hit = joined_nor$rip_hit, ribo_hit = joined_nor$ribo_hit)
print(ct_nor)
ft_nor <- fisher.test(ct_nor)
cat("Normoxia OR:", round(ft_nor$estimate, 2),
    " 95% CI:", round(ft_nor$conf.int[1], 2), "-", round(ft_nor$conf.int[2], 2),
    " p =", signif(ft_nor$p.value, 3), "\n")
```

```{r fisher_hyp}
ct_hyp <- table(rip_hit = joined_hyp$rip_hit, ribo_hit = joined_hyp$ribo_hit)
print(ct_hyp)
ft_hyp <- fisher.test(ct_hyp)
cat("Hypoxia OR:", round(ft_hyp$estimate, 2),
    " 95% CI:", round(ft_hyp$conf.int[1], 2), "-", round(ft_hyp$conf.int[2], 2),
    " p =", signif(ft_hyp$p.value, 3), "\n")
```

```{r or_plot}
or_df <- tibble(
  condition = c("Normoxia", "Hypoxia"),
  OR        = c(ft_nor$estimate, ft_hyp$estimate),
  p_label   = c(paste0("p = ", signif(ft_nor$p.value, 2)),
                paste0("p = ", signif(ft_hyp$p.value, 2)))
) |>
  mutate(condition = factor(condition, levels = c("Normoxia", "Hypoxia")))

p_or <- ggplot(or_df, aes(x = condition, y = OR)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, fill = "#E69F00") +
  geom_text(aes(label = p_label), vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Odds ratio (RIP hit x Riboseq hit)",
       title = "eIF3d RIP vs riboseq overlap") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)

p_or
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "08_odds_ratio.pdf"), p_or, width = 4, height = 4)
```

# CDF: RIP-seq LFC by Riboseq Hit Status

```{r cdf_rip_nor}
p_cdf_rip_nor <- ggplot(joined_nor |> filter(!is.na(rip_lfc)), aes(x = rip_lfc, color = ribo_hit)) +
  stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey60", "TRUE" = "#E69F00"),
                     labels = c("FALSE" = "Riboseq non-hit", "TRUE" = "Riboseq hit (TE LFC>0.5)")) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (FLAG3D IP / IgG)", y = "Cumulative fraction",
       title = "Normoxia: RIP-seq LFC by riboseq hit status", color = NULL) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0, hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.4,
           label = paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(
             wilcox.test(rip_lfc ~ ribo_hit, data = joined_nor |> filter(!is.na(rip_lfc)))$p.value, 3))) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)+
  xlim(-2, 8)
p_cdf_rip_nor
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "08_cdf_rip_by_ribo_normoxia.pdf"), p_cdf_rip_nor, width = 6, height = 4)
```

```{r cdf_rip_hyp}
p_cdf_rip_hyp <- ggplot(joined_hyp |> filter(!is.na(rip_lfc)), aes(x = rip_lfc, color = ribo_hit)) +
  stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey60", "TRUE" = "#E69F00"),
                     labels = c("FALSE" = "Riboseq non-hit", "TRUE" = "Riboseq hit (TE LFC>0.5)")) +
  labs(x = "log2FC (FLAG3D IP / IgG)", y = "Cumulative fraction",
       title = "Hypoxia: RIP-seq LFC by riboseq hit status", color = NULL) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0, hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.4,
           label = paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(
             wilcox.test(rip_lfc ~ ribo_hit, data = joined_hyp |> filter(!is.na(rip_lfc)))$p.value, 3))) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)+
  xlim(-5, 9)
p_cdf_rip_hyp
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "08_cdf_rip_by_ribo_hypoxia.pdf"), p_cdf_rip_hyp, width = 6, height = 4)
```

# CDF: Riboseq TE LFC by RIP Hit Status

```{r cdf_ribo_nor}
p_cdf_ribo_nor <- ggplot(joined_nor |> filter(!is.na(te_lfc)), aes(x = te_lfc, color = rip_hit)) +
  stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey60", "TRUE" = "#E69F00"),
                     labels = c("FALSE" = "RIP non-hit", "TRUE" = "RIP hit (LFC>1)")) +
  labs(x = "TE log2FC (sictrl / si3d)", y = "Cumulative fraction",
       title = "Normoxia: riboseq TE LFC by RIP hit status", color = NULL) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0, hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.4,
           label = paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(
             wilcox.test(te_lfc ~ rip_hit, data = joined_nor |> filter(!is.na(te_lfc)))$p.value, 3))) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)+
  xlim(-0.5, 2)
p_cdf_ribo_nor
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "08_cdf_ribo_by_rip_normoxia.pdf"), p_cdf_ribo_nor, width = 6, height = 4)
```

```{r cdf_ribo_hyp}
p_cdf_ribo_hyp <- ggplot(joined_hyp |> filter(!is.na(te_lfc)), aes(x = te_lfc, color = rip_hit)) +
  stat_ecdf(linewidth = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "grey60", "TRUE" = "#E69F00"),
                     labels = c("FALSE" = "RIP non-hit", "TRUE" = "RIP hit (LFC>1)")) +
  labs(x = "TE log2FC (sictrl / si3d)", y = "Cumulative fraction",
       title = "Hypoxia: riboseq TE LFC by RIP hit status", color = NULL) +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = 0, hjust = 1.1, vjust = -0.4,
           label = paste0("Wilcoxon p = ", signif(
             wilcox.test(te_lfc ~ rip_hit, data = joined_hyp |> filter(!is.na(te_lfc)))$p.value, 3))) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)+
  xlim(-1, 2)
p_cdf_ribo_hyp
ggsave(here("ripseq", "plots", "08_cdf_ribo_by_rip_hypoxia.pdf"), p_cdf_ribo_hyp, width = 6, height = 4)

```
